2603.25333.title: Adaptive Chunking: Optimizing Chunking-Method Selection for RAG
2603.25333.paper_summary: The effectiveness of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is highly dependent on how documents are chunked, that is, segmented into smaller units for indexing and retrieval. Yet, commonly used "one-size-fits-all" approaches often fail to capture the nuanced structure and semantics of diverse texts. Despite its central role, chunking lacks a dedicated evaluation framework, making it difficult to assess and compare strategies independently of downstream performance. We challenge this paradigm by introducing Adaptive Chunking, a framework that selects the most suitable chunking strategy for each document based on a set of five novel intrinsic, document-based metrics: References Completeness (RC), Intrachunk Cohesion (ICC), Document Contextual Coherence (DCC), Block Integrity (BI), and Size Compliance (SC), which directly assess chunking quality across key dimensions. To support this framework, we also introduce two new chunkers, an LLM-regex splitter and a split-then-merge recursive splitter, alongside targeted post-processing techniques. On a diverse corpus spanning legal, technical, and social science domains, our metric-guided adaptive method significantly improves downstream RAG performance. Without changing models or prompts, our framework increases RAG outcomes, raising answers correctness to 72% (from 62-64%) and increasing the number of successfully answered questions by over 30% (65 vs. 49). These results demonstrate that adaptive, document-aware chunking, guided by a complementary suite of intrinsic metrics, offers a practical and effective path to more robust RAG systems. Code available at https://github.com/ekimetrics/adaptive-chunking.
2603.25333.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）的有效性高度依賴於文件的分塊方式，即將文件分割成更小的單位以便於索引和檢索。然而，常用的「一刀切」方法往往無法捕捉到多樣文本的細微結構和語義。儘管分塊在其中扮演著核心角色，但卻缺乏專門的評估框架，使得獨立於下游性能來評估和比較策略變得困難。我們挑戰這一範式，提出自適應分塊，一個根據五個新穎的內在、基於文件的指標選擇最合適的分塊策略的框架：參考完整性（RC）、內部塊凝聚力（ICC）、文件上下文一致性（DCC）、區塊完整性（BI）和大小合規性（SC），這些指標直接評估關鍵維度上的分塊質量。為了支持這一框架，我們還引入了兩個新的分塊器，一個是LLM-regex分割器，另一個是先分割後合併的遞歸分割器，以及針對性的後處理技術。在涵蓋法律、技術和社會科學領域的多樣語料庫上，我們的指標引導的自適應方法顯著改善了下游RAG性能。在不改變模型或提示的情況下，我們的框架提高了RAG的結果，將答案的正確率提升至72%（從62-64%），並使成功回答的問題數量增加超過30%（65對49）。這些結果表明，基於文件的自適應分塊，通過一組互補的內在指標引導，提供了一條實用且有效的路徑，通向更健壯的RAG系統。代碼可在 https://github.com/ekimetrics/adaptive-chunking 獲得。
2603.25333.author: Paulo Roberto de Moura Júnior et.al.
2603.25333.authors: Paulo Roberto de Moura Júnior, Jean Lelong, Annabelle Blangero
